summary: The complete source domain contains only n=0 through n=100 and generates at most 101 array entries, which is too small for an honest asymptotic runtime trend.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 0 through 100

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference initializes at most 101 entries and performs one constant-work recurrence update for each index from 2 through n.
Regression compares all 101 legal n values with an independently memoized recurrence oracle.
